title: Deploy Quest RPG to Internet Computer Mainnet - Frontend

requirements.summary: Configure dfx.json for mainnet deployment with production-ready frontend canister settings
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend canister serves optimized production build

file_operations.description: Add mainnet network configuration with production hosts and ensure frontend canister configuration includes optimized build settings for asset certification and production deployment

requirements.summary: Build frontend in production mode with mainnet environment variables and deploy optimized assets
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend is built with production optimizations (minification, tree-shaking)
Environment variables reference mainnet canister IDs
Frontend canister serves the application with proper asset certification
Application is accessible via public Internet Computer URL

file_operations.description: Create production environment file containing mainnet backend canister ID and Internet Identity canister ID for production deployment
Ensure Vite configuration includes production optimizations including minification, tree-shaking, code splitting, and proper asset handling for Internet Computer deployment
Add or verify deployment scripts for building production bundle and deploying to mainnet frontend canister with proper environment variable handling

requirements.summary: Verify and configure Internet Identity integration for mainnet production environment
acceptanceCriteria: Users can authenticate using Internet Identity on mainnet
useInternetIdentity hook connects to production II canister

file_operations.description: Ensure the InternetIdentityProvider configuration uses production Internet Identity canister URL (https://identity.ic0.app) when deployed to mainnet, with proper delegation expiration and idle timeout settings for production use
Verify the useActor hook correctly references mainnet backend canister ID from environment variables and creates actor with production agent configuration

requirements.summary: Verify all frontend functionality works on mainnet including onboarding, quest management, progression systems, and localStorage persistence
acceptanceCriteria: Onboarding survey completes and generates personalized quests
Quests can be created, edited, and marked complete
XP awards correctly and triggers rank progression
All localStorage operations function on mainnet

file_operations.description: Add production environment checks and error handling for localStorage operations to ensure state persistence works correctly on mainnet, including fallback mechanisms if localStorage quota is exceeded
Verify onboarding flow completes successfully on mainnet and handles edge cases like network interruptions during quest generation, ensuring generated quests are properly saved to localStorage
Add production telemetry or console logging (removable post-verification) to track quest completion, XP awards, and streak updates for mainnet testing validation
